dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing dysuria, urinary frequency, and urgency for the past two days. I also have suprapubic tenderness and a low-grade fever of 38.1°C.
Understood. Are you experiencing any flank pain, back pain, or nausea associated with these symptoms?
I have a mild back ache, but I do not have any flank pain, nausea, or vomiting.
Are you allergic to any medications, foods, or environmental factors?
I have a known allergy to sulfa drugs, which causes me to develop hives.
[DDX] (Uncomplicated cystitis; Pyelonephritis; Pelvic inflammatory disease; Nephrolithiasis; Interstitial cystitis)
